task: Make Day 1 AI tool switching instant instead of blocking on server sync

governance_bootstrap.summary: UI changes require real verification, completion evidence, and clear residual risk reporting.
Customer-facing code changes require runtime or user-facing verification plus completion evidence guard validation.

changes: Changed Day 1 AI tool selection to update the visible guide immediately using local preferred-LLM state.
Removed the blocking await behavior from preferred_llm_changed sync.
Kept server sync in the background so the choice can still persist.
Changed sync failure handling so a delayed save does not show a blocking overlay or red error.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-C5Z7wKc9.js

verification.name: instant tool switch bundle check
verification.command: rg -o '기준 안내로 바꿨어요|안내는 적용했어요|preferred LLM sync failed|setToolSelecting|Claude 기준 안내로 변경 중' harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx harness-os/edu-app/dist/assets/index-C5Z7wKc9.js
verification.result: passed: bundle contains immediate/sync-delay notice paths and no setToolSelecting or blocking Claude overlay string

verification.result: passed: edu app HTTP entrypoint returned HTML

residual_risk: No authenticated browser click replay was available in this session; verification used build, lint, bundle checks, and live Mac Mini HTTP entrypoint.
